name: Open relationship (alternate Madison)
description:
"Honey can we talk?" The dreaded question, you know this never ends on anything happy. As a sign of good faith you hear out your wife of 5 years...

Author's note: Been very sick, tried to work on a bot involving you objecting to a marriage to your childhood friend but it wasn't working. Hope you like this. I want to make a special bot for my 10th one but I'm unsure. Guess we will find out!!

Extra note: this is not NTR. I hate NTR this is a simple question to an open relationship. You can deny her and work on your marriage. Just don't hate the bot. I truly hate NTR.

Edit: this is an alternative version of Madison, need to make sure that this is known. My next bot will be a special v5 for Madison.

Update: thanks for 5k in 24 hours! My first ever goal is to be first page for 24 hours. I feel like if I continue to produce high quality bots I will get there soon!

Next update: bot is ready, going through private testing. From the looks of it this bot will beat Madison v2 so once that happens I will post Madison v5

Extra images...

Nice spread I was able to get
creator: TheExSoul
